mapper.select: select id, template_id, chapter_id, source_code, source_system, source_table, source_name, source_desc, lifecycle_stage, source_record_type, cast(join_condition_json as char) as join_condition_json, cast(filter_condition_json as char) as filter_condition_json, apply_object_type, supply_mode_scope, key_part_scope, required_flag, enabled_flag, sort_order, cast(attrs_json as char) as attrs_json, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at from t1_dossier_template_data_source where template_id = #{templateId} order by sort_order asc, created_at asc
mapper.insert:
insert into t1_dossier_template_data_source (id, template_id, chapter_id, source_code, source_system, source_table, source_name, source_desc, lifecycle_stage, source_record_type, join_condition_json, filter_condition_json, apply_object_type, supply_mode_scope, key_part_scope, required_flag, enabled_flag, sort_order, attrs_json, created_by, updated_by) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.templateId}, #{item.chapterId}, #{item.sourceCode}, #{item.sourceSystem}, #{item.sourceTable}, #{item.sourceName}, #{item.sourceDesc}, #{item.lifecycleStage}, #{item.sourceRecordType}, #{item.joinConditionJson}, #{item.filterConditionJson}, #{item.applyObjectType}, #{item.supplyModeScope}, #{item.keyPartScope}, #{item.requiredFlag}, #{item.enabledFlag}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.attrsJson}, #{item.createdBy}, #{item.updatedBy})
mapper.delete:
delete from t1_dossier_template_data_source where template_id in
#{templateId}
